story: Alden, frail and despairing, dreams of a faceless figure who offers to grant his wish for health. He includes Millie in the wish. The figure says: when they wake, both will be as they were at their healthiest—done. The next afternoon Mara and David stop by after work to see them. No one answers the door. Inside, the apartment is tidy and silent. In the bedroom they find two sleeping infants and no sign of Alden or Millie.
implausible_knowledge: The figure says: when they wake, both will be as they were at their healthiest—done.
question: Upon discovering two infants in the bedroom and no sign of Alden and Millie, what will Mara and David do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Recognize them as Alden and Millie, then take the infants home.
answer_without_knowledge: Call the police to report Alden and Millie missing and stay with the infants.
